arts.ttl: Chelsea’s Barcelona transfer demand as Thomas Tuchel plan revealed
arts.sum: The 21-year-old has struggled to break into Maresca’s side this season, with his only appearance under the Italian manager coming in the Carabao Cup. He was linked with a move away from Stamford Bridge this summer. Former Chelsea boss Thomas Tuchel will be given a warm welcome to Stamford Bridge when he comes to watch members of his England squad.

arts.ttl: Banished Chelsea star Josh Acheampong transfer feelings already clear amid contract stand-off
arts.sum: Despite Chelsea barring young defender Josh Acheampong from playing for the club again until he signs a new contract, the player's goals for a future at Stamford Bridge have already been made clear. Chelsea were working without 14 first-team players that day and Mauricio Pochettino - who had turned to Acheampong in training throughout the season - offered him a brief chance to impress at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: What Chelsea star Mykhailo Mudryk did during Arsenal Champions League clash speaks volumes
arts.sum: Chelsea star Mykhailo Mudryk has been spotted in the stands at Emirates Stadium for the Champions League clash between Arsenal, the team he very nearly joined, and his former club Shakhtar Donetsk. But Misha and all the players [who] are not getting so many chances, [Barrow] is a good chance for them." Since then, Mudryk has played just 20 minutes of Premier League football, though he did grab an assist in the 4-2 win over Gent in Conference League action.

arts.ttl: Enzo Fernandez: Does £106.8m signing deserve to start for Chelsea?
arts.sum: This all-action role has taken the form of starting next to Caicedo in a 4-2-3-1 formation before pushing forward almost alongside Cole Palmer while the left-back - usually Marc Cucurella - tucks in centrally behind him when Chelsea have possession. The Argentine infamously had more touches, registered more successful passes and made more tackles than any other player in the 2022 World Cup final.

Chelsea lost Thiago Silva on a free transfer during the summer window and while the club are continuing to scour the globe for the best young talents in world football, they are reportedly monitoring Dias’ situation at Man City as they ponder a potential swoop in 2025. However, Dias has now emerged as a possible target and the west London giants are set to eye a move in 2025.

arts.ttl: Chelsea learn huge Anthony Gordon update before Newcastle clash as £45m decision proven right
arts.sum: Newcastle United have announced a significant Anthony Gordon update before they play Chelsea twice in four days, starting with a Premier League clash this Sunday. However, Maresca and his players will be hoping Gordon cannot find the back of the net in either of Newcastle's next two games, with the weekend's league clash shortly followed by a Carabao Cup tie between the two sides.

arts.ttl: Panathinaikos lineup vs. Chelsea: Predicted XI for Conference League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Panathinaikos could line up for Thursday's Conference League clash with Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Chelsea lineup vs. Panathinaikos: Predicted XI for Conference League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Chelsea could line up for Thursday's Conference League clash with Panathinaikos.

arts.ttl: Preview: Panathinaikos vs. Chelsea - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Conference League clash between Panathinaikos and Chelsea, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: What are Chelsea thinking?! Acheampong decision threatens to RUIN Maresca's progress
arts.sum: Real Madrid, Paris Saint-Germain and Liverpool are all interested in signing the Cobham academy product, and Chelsea’s approach could see them lose one of their most promising young talents. The talented 18-year-old is yet to sign a new deal with the Stamford Bridge outfit and the club have informed him that he will not play until he agrees fresh terms.
